_comment: Route (b) FULL diagnostic: roll out ALL 50 libero_wm demos, each FROM ITS OWN demo init sim state (HDF5 demo_(ep-base)/states[0]) with ITS OWN terminal frame as goal -> (start,goal) matches within-trajectory training exactly.
